title: RNA Extraction from Cecum Contents of Gnotobiotic Mice
author: Haley Gause

steps_raw.instruction: Harvest cecum and cecum contents. Drop ½ of cecum contents into 10 ml RNAlater. Leaves tubes at 4 o C for 1 day minimum (7 day maximum).
Pre-weigh 2ml tubes. Add 1ml of RNAlater-cecum contents to each tube (~200mg contents) using wide-bore 1000µL tips and centrifuge at 3500RPM for 5 min to pellet contents. Remove supernatant.
Weigh pellets. Subtract weight of empty tube to find weight of cecum pellet. Store pellet aliquots at -80 o C.
To 2ml RNase-free screw cap tube, add ~500µL ice-cold 0.5µM zirconia beads (1 tube per 100mg cecum contents). Keep tubes on ice until use.
Place cecum contents aliquots on ice to thaw.

Re-suspend aliquot in the following per 100mg (200mg – multiple all volumes by 2): 500µL Lysis Buffer (200 mM NaCl, 20mM EDTA) 210µL 20% SDS 500µL phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (PCI) (pH 4.5, 125:24:1)
Transfer resuspended cecum contents to screw-cap tube containing beads. Split total volume between 2 bead-beating tubes (each has ~1210uL)
Bead-beat tubes 5min using Mini-beadbeater
Centrifuge @ 10000xg for 5 minutes to separate phases
Transfer aqueous phase to new Eppendorf tube. Add equal volumes phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (PCI) and vortex 20s. Spin @ 10000xg for 5 minutes.
Transfer aqueous phase to phase-lock tube (heavy). Add equal volume of PCI, shake well to mix and spin @ 10000xg for 3 minutes.
Add equal volume PCI to aqueous above the phase-lock layer, mix well by shaking and spin @ 10000xg for 3 minutes.
go to step #12 two more times (total of 6 Phenol chloroform extractions). Move aqueous to new phase-lock tube as needed.

Decant aqueous phase from phase-lock tube to new RNase-free 1.5ml eppendorf tube. Add 1 volume RT isopropanol and place at -20C for 20 minutes. Note: Any amount of time over 20 minutes will cause increased crashing out of the complex carbohydrates present and will reduce yield and purity.
Centrifuge at max speed for 25 min, 4 o C. You will see a disk of RNA form between two layers (not a pellet like traditional precipitations).

Carefully remove ALL liquid from tube (above and below disk of nucleic acid). If you don’t remove the liquid below the disk, the carbohydrates will begin to crash out and crystalize when doing the EtOH washes and your sample will be less pure.
Wash 2X with 750µl 75% ethanol. Invert to wash tube. Centrifuge max speed for 5 minutes, 4 o C.
Remove all ethanol from pellet (remove supernatant, quick spin tube, remove residual ethanol with aspirator). Air dry pellet for <5 min if a lot of residual ethanol remains.
Resuspend pellet in 50 µL 45 o C nuclease-free water
Make sure pellet is completely resuspended before moving forward! Place at 45 o C for a few minutes to fully resuspend
Follow NEB Monarch RNA Clean-up as documented in product's protocol and detailed below:
Add 2X RNA Cleanup Buffer (100ul to 50ul sample)
Add 1 vol 100% ethanol to sample (150ul)
Invert/flick to mix. Transfer to Spin-cartridge. Spin at 12000xg for 1min. Discard flow-through
Add 700µL wash buffer I. Centrifuge and discard flow-through
Wash 2X with 500µL wash buffer II. Centrifuge and discard flow-through.
Centrifuge spin-cartridge ~ 12000xg for 1 min to dry column and membrane.
Place dried column in clean Eppendorf tube.
Add 50ul nuclease-free water to center of membrane. Let incubate at RT for 1 min. Centrifuge to collect flow-through.
To 50µL sample, add and mix gently: 5 µL 10X buffer; 1 µl TURBO DNA
Incubate at 37 o C for 20-30 minutes
Resuspend DNAse Inactivation Reagent by vortexing. Add 6 µL inactivation reagent to samples and mix by flicking.
Incubate at RT for 5 minutes. Flick tube occasionally to resuspend inactivation reagent.
Centrifuge tube @ 10000xg for 1.5 minutes. Carefully transfer 50ul into new tube.
Add 25ul 7.5M Lithium chloride precipitation solution (final= 2.5M) and 1ul glycoblue co-precipitant. Store at -20 o C overnight.
Centrifuge at max speed for 25 min, 4 o C. You should see large, gelatinous pellet form at bottom of tube.
Wash 2X with 750µl ice-cold 75% ethanol. Vortex tubes ~30s to completely wash tube and pellet. Centrifuge max speed for 5 minutes, 4 o C.
Remove all ethanol from pellet (remove supernatant, quick spin, remove residual ethanol with aspirator). Air dry pellet for ~5 min if a lot of residual ethanol remains.
Resuspend pellet in 30 µL 50 o C nuclease-free water. Make sure pellet is completely resuspended before moving forward!
